documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: ForgeCode is the world's #1 coding harness — ranked #1 on TermBench 2.0. Autonomously write, refactor, debug, and ship code from your terminal.
documents.summary: This document provides a step-by-step guide for installing, configuring, and authenticating the ForgeCode CLI tool to enable AI-powered coding directly within a Zsh terminal environment.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Get started with ForgeCode in minutes. Learn the essential workflows and commands to enhance your development process with AI assistance.
documents.summary: This document provides a foundational overview of how to authenticate, initialize, and utilize ForgeCode's AI-powered assistance for code analysis, development, version control, and debugging.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Comprehensive guide for configuring AI agents in ForgeCode
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive guide to configuring AI agents within the ForgeCode platform, detailing parameters such as temperature, context management, and output settings.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Configure ForgeCode to work with your preferred AI provider and understand provider priority.
documents.summary: This document provides instructions for configuring, managing, and switching between various AI service providers within the ForgeCode platform using command-line tools.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn about environment variables and configuration options for ForgeCode.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Configure robust error handling with automatic retries for improved resilience
documents.summary: This document explains the automatic retry mechanism and exponential backoff configuration for handling tool call parsing errors in ForgeCode.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn how to define project-specific guidelines and development standards using AGENTS.md
documents.summary: This document explains how to establish persistent AI behavior and development standards within a project by using an AGENTS.md markdown file.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Every development team has its own way of doing things. Code style preferences, testing patterns, error handling approaches, naming conventions - the list goes on. The problem? A coding harness doesn't know your team's specific practices unless you tell them.
documents.summary: This document explains how to configure ForgeCode's custom project rules using an AGENTS.md file to enforce team-specific coding standards and guidelines within AI-assisted development sessions.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Configure settings for your ForgeCode instance
documents.summary: This document describes the root-level configuration options available in the forge.yaml file for managing ForgeCode system behavior, request limits, and model parameters.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn how agents can use other agents as tools for specialized workflows
documents.summary: This document explains how to implement agent delegation, allowing orchestrator agents to utilize specialist agents as tools to perform specific tasks.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Optimize AI conversations with automatic context management
documents.summary: This document explains the context compaction feature in ForgeCode, which automatically summarizes older conversation segments to optimize token usage, reduce costs, and maintain long-term context for AI agents.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn about ForgeCode's security features and how to use them effectively.
documents.summary: This document outlines the security architecture of ForgeCode, focusing on its restricted shell implementation and protective mechanisms to prevent unauthorized system operations.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Need an agent that specializes in React development? Or one focused on security auditing? You can create custom agents tailored to your specific needs using simple markdown files.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn how to switch between different agents in ForgeCode and choose the right one for your specific development tasks

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Understanding the different specialized agents in ForgeCode and when to use each.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn about ForgeCode's auto-complete features including intelligent command completion and file path completion.

documents.title: ForgeCode
documents.description: Learn a multi-agent AI development workflow with strategic planning and execution using Muse for analysis and ForgeCode for implementation.
